name: Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises Inc. 7.75% Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises Inc. 7.75% Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock represents a class of preferred stock issued by Babcock & Wilcox. Specific details regarding the company's main business include energy and environmental technologies and services for power and industrial markets. The company is headquartered in Akron, Ohio.
